synopsis:
**The Scoundrel's Code!**
After helping destroy the Death Star, Han Solo's ready to cash in his reward and return to life as a scoundrel. But when Luke Skywalker asks for one last favor, Han gets pulled into a rebel mission that might wreck all of his plans. Co-starring Chewbacca and introducing Akko, an old friend who might actually out-scoundrel Han himself!
title: Age Of Rebellion: Han Solo
